ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "rxcui" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication (RXCUI) */,
  "atc4" TEXT /* ATC4 code for the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medication */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the medication */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Dosage form of the medication (e.g., tablet, injection) */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the medication (e.g., 25mg, 5mg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rxcui")
)

CREATE TABLE "ndcs" (
  "ndc" TEXT /* National drug code (NDC) */,
  "rxcui" INTEGER /* Reference to the medication (RXCUI) */,
  "ndc_description" TEXT /* Description of the NDC */,
  "package_size" TEXT /* Package size of the medication */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure (e.g., tablets, vials) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ndc"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ndcs_rxcui FOREIGN KEY ("rxcui") REFERENCES medications ("rxcui")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data entry */,
  "rxcui" INTEGER /* Reference to the medication (RXCUI) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of sales data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of sales data */,
  "sales_revenue" REAL /* Total sales revenue for the month */,
  "num_prescriptions" INTEGER /* Number of prescriptions for the month */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sales occurred */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., retail, online) */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_rxcui FOREIGN KEY ("rxcui") REFERENCES medications ("rxcui")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "rxcui" INTEGER /* Reference to the medication (RXCUI) */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date of the prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "prescriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prescriber */,
  "prescriber_name" TEXT /* Name of the prescriber */,
  "prescription_status" TEXT /* Status of the prescription (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_rxcui FOREIGN KEY ("rxcui") REFERENCES medications ("rxcui"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Dosage form of the medication (e.g., tablet, injection)
Unique identifier for each sales data entry
Total sales revenue for the month
Number of prescriptions for the month
Status of the prescription (e.g., active, completed)
Date of birth of the patient
